zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Roynon於1401年出生在英國薩默塞特布拉可福德時，她的父親John Roynon46歲，母親Joan de Longland49歲。她於大約1414年與Hugh Malet在英國薩默塞特布利其沃特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年2月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特聖 奧德利斯享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Roynon于1401年出生在英国薩默塞特布拉可福德时，她的父亲John Roynon46岁，母亲Joan de Longland49岁。她于大约1414年与Hugh Malet在英国薩默塞特布利其沃特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年2月在英国英格兰薩默塞特聖 奧德利斯享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Roynon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Roynon was born in 1401, in Blackford, Somerset, England, her father, John Roynon, was 46 and her mother, Joan de Longland, was 49. She married Hugh Malet about 1414, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died in February 1460, in St Audries, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Roynon est née en 1401, à Blackford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Roynon, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan de Longland, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Malet environ 1414, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1460, à St Audries, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Audries, West Quantockshead, Somerse: St Audries, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Roynon 1401 in Blackford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Roynon 46 und ihre Mutter Joan de Longland 49. Sie hat um 1414 in Bridgwater, Somerset, England Hugh Malet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1460 im Alter von 59 Jahren in St Audries, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Hugh Malet circa 1414, nel Bridgwater, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1460, nel St Audries, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Roynonが1401年にイギリスソメルセトブラクフォードで生まれた時，父John Roynonは46歳，母Joan de Longlandは49歳であった。約1414年にイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターでHugh Maletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年2月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスト アウドリーズで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Roynon(이)가 1401년 영국 서머세트 블랙퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Roynon(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Longland(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 대략 1414년 영국 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 Hugh Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 2월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스트 오드리스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Audries, West Quantockshead, Somerse: St Audries, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Roynon nasceu em 1401, em Blackford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Roynon, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Longland, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Malet aproximadamente 1414, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1460, em St Audries, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.St. Audries, West Quantockshead, Somerse: St Audries, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Roynon родилась в 1401 г. в местности блэккфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Roynon было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Longland, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Malet около 1414 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла февраль 1460 г. в местности ст аудриесь, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Roynon nació en 1401, en Blackford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Roynon, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joan de Longland, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Hugh Malet aproximadamente 1414, en Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1460, en St Audries, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
